name: Emovils — Procesador de Pagos (Stripe → Reserva Confirmada)
description: Cuando Stripe confirma un pago, crea la reserva en Airtable, notifica al dueño y envía confirmación al cliente

parameters.code:
import hmac
import hashlib
import time

payload = $input.rawBody
sig_header = $input.headers.get('stripe-signature', '')
secret = $env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET

# Verificar firma de Stripe
parts = dict(p.split('=', 1) for p in sig_header.split(','))
timestamp = parts.get('t', '')
signature = parts.get('v1', '')

expected = hmac.new(
    secret.encode('utf-8'),
    f'{timestamp}.{payload}'.encode('utf-8'),
    hashlib.sha256
).hexdigest()

if not hmac.compare_digest(expected, signature):
    raise ValueError('Firma inválida')

import json
event = json.loads(payload)
return [{'event': event, 'valid': True}]

session = $input.item.json.event['data']['object']
meta = session.get('metadata', {})

return [{
    'session_id': session['id'],
    'amount_usd': session['amount_total'] / 100,
    'customer_email': session.get('customer_email', ''),
    'whatsapp': meta.get('whatsapp', ''),
    'customer_name': meta.get('customer_name', ''),
    'fecha_viaje': meta.get('fecha_viaje', ''),
    'origen': meta.get('origen', 'AILA/SDQ'),
    'destino': meta.get('destino', ''),
    'product': meta.get('product', 'airport_sencillo')
}]
